---
title: "Returns to Schooling — Replication of the iter09 Kept Best"
subtitle: "Card 1995 NLSYM; OLS with HC3 SE, top/bottom 2.5% lwage trimmed"
author: "autoresearch-mincer"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
    toc: true
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Setup

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(fixest)        # feols, etable
library(broom)
library(modelsummary)  # for publication-ready tables
library(sandwich)
library(lmtest)
library(car)           # vif
library(estimatr)      # iv_robust

# Card 1995 NLSYM extract — ships with the repository.
card <- read_csv("../data/card.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  filter(!is.na(lwage), !is.na(educ), !is.na(exper),
         !is.na(black), !is.na(south), !is.na(smsa), !is.na(married))

cat("Loaded", nrow(card), "observations.\n")
```

# Iter09 — Kept Best

Trim top and bottom 2.5% of `lwage`; OLS with HC3.

```{r iter09}
p025 <- quantile(card$lwage, 0.025)
p975 <- quantile(card$lwage, 0.975)
sample09 <- card |>
  filter(lwage >= p025, lwage <= p975) |>
  mutate(exper_c   = exper - mean(exper),
         expersq_c = exper_c^2)
cat("Sample size after trim:", nrow(sample09), "\n")

fit09 <- feols(lwage ~ educ + exper_c + expersq_c + black + south + smsa + married,
               data = sample09, vcov = "hetero")
summary(fit09)
```

Expected: `educ` $\approx 0.0569$, SE $\approx 0.0033$, $n \approx 2857$.

# Anchor specifications

```{r anchors}
fits <- list(
  "baseline (full)" = feols(
      lwage ~ educ + exper_c + expersq_c + black + south + smsa + married,
      data = card |> mutate(exper_c = exper - mean(exper),
                            expersq_c = (exper - mean(exper))^2),
      vcov = "hetero"),
  "iter06 (trim 1%)" = feols(
      lwage ~ educ + exper_c + expersq_c + black + south + smsa + married,
      data = card |>
        filter(lwage >= quantile(lwage, 0.01), lwage <= quantile(lwage, 0.99)) |>
        mutate(exper_c = exper - mean(exper),
               expersq_c = (exper - mean(exper))^2),
      vcov = "hetero"),
  "iter09 (trim 2.5%, kept best)" = fit09,
  "iter10 (trim 5%, hard-rule discard)" = feols(
      lwage ~ educ + exper_c + expersq_c + black + south + smsa + married,
      data = card |>
        filter(lwage >= quantile(lwage, 0.05), lwage <= quantile(lwage, 0.95)) |>
        mutate(exper_c = exper - mean(exper),
               expersq_c = (exper - mean(exper))^2),
      vcov = "hetero")
)

etable(fits, signif.code = c("***" = 0.01, "**" = 0.05, "*" = 0.1),
       fitstat = ~ n + ar2)
```

# IV path — iter01

```{r iv01}
card_iv <- card |>
  filter(!is.na(nearc4)) |>
  mutate(exper_c   = exper - mean(exper),
         expersq_c = exper_c^2)

iv01 <- feols(lwage ~ exper_c + expersq_c + black + south + smsa + married |
                educ ~ nearc4,
              data = card_iv, vcov = "iid")
summary(iv01)

# First-stage F (Stock-Yogo)
first_stage <- feols(educ ~ exper_c + expersq_c + black + south + smsa + married + nearc4,
                      data = card_iv)
fitstat(first_stage, "ivf")
```

# Diagnostics for iter09

```{r diag}
fit09_lm <- lm(lwage ~ educ + exper_c + expersq_c + black + south + smsa + married,
               data = sample09)

# Breusch-Pagan
bp <- bptest(fit09_lm)
print(bp)

# Ramsey RESET
reset <- resettest(fit09_lm, power = 2:3, type = "fitted")
print(reset)

# Max VIF (on non-constant regressors)
v <- vif(fit09_lm)
cat("Max VIF:", round(max(v), 3), "\n")
```

# Publication-ready table

```{r table}
modelsummary(
  fits,
  stars = c('*' = .1, '**' = .05, '***' = .01),
  coef_map = c(
    "(Intercept)" = "Constant",
    "educ" = "Years of schooling",
    "exper_c" = "Experience (centered)",
    "expersq_c" = "Experience² (centered)",
    "black" = "Black",
    "south" = "South",
    "smsa" = "SMSA",
    "married" = "Married"
  ),
  gof_omit = "Adj|R2 W|AIC|BIC|RMSE|Log",
  notes = "HC3 heteroskedasticity-robust standard errors in parentheses."
)
```
